articles.title: 'Superhuman' managers shouldn't have to ask for help - Beard's family on loss
articles.summary: The family of former WSL manager Matt Beard tell BBC Sport about the emotional burden of football management, and the changes they want to see.

articles.title: Forty years of the EFL play-offs - choose your favourite memories
articles.summary: BBC Sport looks back at 15 memorable moments from 40 years of the play-offs in the English Football League.

articles.title: What is Scotland's most iconic goal? This time - Griffiths v Gemmill
articles.summary: Vote to find out what goal will be crowned Scotland's greatest.

articles.title: Foul or fair? Should Spurs have got FIRST PL penalty of season vs Leeds?
articles.summary: Tottenham were denied a last-gasp penalty in their 1-1 draw with Leeds - one that could have seen them all-but-secure Premier League survival.

articles.title: Spurs drag out safety battle to keep nerves jangling
articles.summary: Tottenham hit the self-destruct button once more to leave Roberto de Zerbi frustrated as fight to avoid relegation looks set to go to the wire, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

articles.title: Calvert-Lewin penalty earns Leeds draw at Tottenham
articles.summary: Tottenham Hotspur squander the opportunity to take a significant step towards Premier League safety as they are held to a 1-1 draw at home by Leeds United.

articles.title: 'One of saves of the season' - Kinsky's redemption moment at Tottenham?
articles.summary: Two months after many thought Antonin Kinsky would never play for Tottenham again the goalkeeper makes one of the saves of the season to earn Spurs a point in their fight for Premier League survival.

articles.title: Five 'fouls' in one move - breaking down Premier League corner chaos
articles.summary: The Premier League season has been defined by set-piece drama. It came to a head at West Ham on Sunday, when the VAR could have penalised any one of a handful of potential fouls.

articles.title: Watch: Mead marks 50th Arsenal goal with stunning double
articles.summary: Watch Beth Mead score her 50th and 51st WSL goals for Arsenal with the England forward set to depart the club at the end of the season.

articles.title: Rashford goal helps Barca beat Real Madrid to lift title
articles.summary: Watch highlights as Barcelona beat Real Madrid in El Clasico to secure back-to-back La Liga titles.

articles.title: Chelsea start contacting prospective head coaches
articles.summary: Chelsea are starting to make contact with prospective managerial candidates as they move towards appointing the club's next permanent head coach, including Andoni Iraola, Xabi Alonso, Marco Silva, and...

articles.title: Football Daily
articles.summary: Was David Raya fouled, did VAR get it right and is a draw a missed opportunity for Spurs?

articles.title: West Ham set to contact referees' body over disallowed goal
articles.summary: West Ham will contact referees' body the Professional Game Match Officials (PGMO) over their disallowed equaliser against Arsenal on Sunday.

articles.summary: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?

articles.title: How big is Rohl's Rangers rebuild this summer?
articles.summary: Manager Danny Rohl has to learn some lessons, and quickly, after falling away to a third-place finish in the Scottish Premiership, writes Kheredine Idessane.

articles.title: Southampton ask for more time over spying claims
articles.summary: Southampton request more time to conduct an internal review after being charged with spying on Championship play-off rivals Middlesbrough.

articles.title: Spieth plays down Grand Slam pressure: 'My situation is different to Rory!'
articles.summary: Jordan Spieth believes his game is primed to challenge for PGA Championship victory, but insists his pressure to complete the career Grand Slam is different to what Rory McIlroy faced.

articles.title: 'Brilliant' Belloumi turns Jakirovic's displeasure into delight
articles.summary: Hull City winger Mohamed Belloumi made up for his lack of preparedness to win the Championship play-off semi-final against Millwall for his side.

articles.title: Hull sink Millwall to reach Championship play-off final
articles.summary: Hull produced a clinical display at Millwall to win 2-0 in the second leg and reach the Championship play-off final.

articles.title: Jakirovic: Taking Hull to Wembley the best thing I've experienced in football
articles.summary: Sergej Jakirovic says taking Hull to the Sky Bet Championship play-off final is "maybe the best thing that happened in football in my life" and that leading the Tigers out at Wembley will be "a dream ...

articles.title: Scienza: Play-off goal in Germany was pure ecstasy - I want that with Saints
articles.summary: It was a remarkable second half of the season for Southampton, and one of the key men behind the change in fortune is Leo Scienza.

articles.title: Duckett hits double century as Robinson strengthens England Test claim
articles.summary: Ben Duckett blasted his way to an unbeaten double century on Monday as County Championship title contenders Nottingham and Surrey settled for a draw at Trent Bridge.

articles.summary: Huddersfield Town boss Liam Manning leaves the club by mutual consent, two months after taking compassionate leave.
